---
title: "Changelog"
toc: false
---

Changes are tracked separately in each repository: the **ferx-core** Rust engine
(`CHANGELOG.md`) and the **ferx-r** R package (`NEWS.md`). Use the tabs below to
switch between them.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
read_changelog <- function(local, ci) {
  path <- if (file.exists(local)) local else ci
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    return(sprintf("_Changelog source not found (`%s`)._", path))
  }
  lines <- readLines(path)
  # Demote every real markdown heading by two levels so it sits below the
  # `##` tab titles (otherwise each `#`/`##` would open a spurious tab).
  # Skip lines inside fenced code blocks so `#`/`#>` R comments are untouched.
  in_fence <- FALSE
  for (i in seq_along(lines)) {
    if (grepl("^\\s*```", lines[i])) { in_fence <- !in_fence; next }
    if (!in_fence && grepl("^#{1,6} ", lines[i])) {
      lines[i] <- paste0("##", lines[i])
    }
  }
  paste(lines, collapse = "\n")
}

corelog  <- read_changelog("../ferx-core/CHANGELOG.md", "/tmp/ferx-core/CHANGELOG.md")
news     <- read_changelog("../ferx-r/NEWS.md",         "/tmp/ferx-r/NEWS.md")

cat(
  '::: {.panel-tabset}\n\n',
  '## ferx-core (Rust engine)\n\n',
  corelog, '\n\n',
  '## ferx-r (R package)\n\n',
  news, '\n\n',
  ':::\n',
  sep = ""
)
```
